action.reasoning: Observation: best score is still the 0.6/0.4 DINO 4e+10e ensemble (balanced_accuracy 0.6245); weight-only tuning around it has plateaued. Analysis: a new DINO checkpoint with a different random seed should be a low-risk source of diversity for ensembling, and a 4-epoch run has already shown the best individual hidden generalization compared with longer training. Decision: train another 4-epoch DINOv2-base model with the same strong setup but seed 123, then submit it standalone to measure whether it is useful before ensembling.
